name: ppt-icon-studio
description: Use natural language to create PowerPoint-safe custom icons from prompts, themes, or images.

interface.shortDescription: Turn prompts or images into PPT-ready icons.
interface.longDescription: Automatically handles natural-language requests like converting an attached image into a PowerPoint-style icon, creating editable PPT-safe SVGs, generating color vector SVGs, recreating reference images as slide icons, and exporting high-resolution transparent PNG fallbacks.
defaultPrompt: 이 이미지를 PPT 기본 아이콘처럼 SVG로 만들어줘.
Create PPT-safe SVG icons from this theme.
Turn this reference image into a PPT icon.
